title: sorghum brevifolium
intro: Sorghum brevifolium, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of sorghum brevifolium include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and ointments for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
